translation_config.context: This video provides information about the importance and functions of an operating system. An operating system acts as an intermediary between the hardware and the user, helping in operating the system. It helps manage all system resources and allows application programs to interact with the hardware. The main purpose of an operating system is to efficiently manage hardware and keep the system running smoothly. In addition, it helps run all application programs and also supports system security. In the next video, we will discuss the goals and functions of an operating system.
